Dashboard.title: SEO Compass
Dashboard.subtitle: Paste your website URL below to check for beginner SEO mistakes and database-crashing risks.
Dashboard.shieldDirectDesc: The scan was completed directly. No anti-bot protections blocked our analysis.
Dashboard.shieldBypassDesc: This website is actively protected against bots (e.g. Cloudflare). Our Premium Scraper successfully bypassed the security to analyze the site.
Dashboard.actionPlanDesc: Critical issues prioritized by impact. Fix these immediately to avoid Google penalties.
Dashboard.deepAiAnalysisDesc: Let AI rewrite your missing tags perfectly.
Dashboard.perfectSeo: Perfect! Your website's SEO foundation is rock solid.
Dashboard.analyzingDescPart2: for SEO vulnerabilities and metadata issues.
Dashboard.indexabilityPass: Pass. Search engines can crawl and index this page.
Dashboard.indexabilityFail: CRITICAL: Your website is blocking Google (Noindex tag found). It will NOT appear in search results!
Dashboard.robotsBlockError: Scanning blocked by robots.txt (Disallow: /). To scan this site, please enable 'Ignore Robots.txt' (Login required) or update your robots.txt file.
Dashboard.loginRequiredError: This option is only available for logged-in users. Please sign in to use advanced scanning options.
Dashboard.duplicationPass: Safe. No duplicate H1 tags and Canonical URL is properly set.

missingTitle.title: Missing <title> Tag
missingTitle.whyItMatters: The <title> tag is the first thing Google looks at to understand what your page is about. Without it, your page has almost no chance of ranking for your target keywords.

missingDescription.title: Missing Meta Description
missingDescription.whyItMatters: The meta description is the snippet of text that appears under your link in Google search results. A missing description drastically lowers your click-through rate (CTR).

missingH1.title: Missing H1 Tag
missingH1.whyItMatters: The H1 tag is the primary heading of your page. Search engines use it to understand the main topic of your content. You must have exactly one H1 per page.

multipleH1s.title: Multiple H1 Tags Detected
multipleH1s.whyItMatters: You should only have ONE H1 tag per page. Having multiple H1 tags confuses search engines about the primary topic of your page.

missingCanonical.title: Missing Canonical Tag
missingCanonical.whyItMatters: Without a canonical tag, search engines might penalize your site for duplicate content if it can be accessed via http/https or www/non-www. This tag tells Google which URL is the 'master' copy.

missingRobotsSitemap.title: Missing robots.txt or sitemap.xml
missingRobotsSitemap.whyItMatters: These technical files tell search engines exactly which pages to crawl and index, and which to ignore. Missing them makes it harder for Google to discover your content.
missingRobotsSitemap.expected: Both files should be accessible at the root domain.

missingOg.title: Missing OpenGraph / Social Tags
missingOg.whyItMatters: Without OpenGraph tags, social media platforms (Facebook, Twitter, LinkedIn) won't show a rich preview card with an image when your link is shared. This ruins social traffic.

missingAlt.title: Missing Image Alt Tags
missingAlt.whyItMatters: Images without alt text hurt accessibility for visually impaired users and cost you valuable traffic from Google Image Search.
missingAlt.expected: Add alt='Descriptive text' to img tags

blockedByRobots.title: robots.txt Block Detected
blockedByRobots.whyItMatters: Your robots.txt file is explicitly blocking all search engine crawlers (Disallow: /). If this remains, your website will be permanently removed from search results on Google and other search engines.
blockedByRobots.expected: Remove or modify the Disallow: / rule in your robots.txt file

missingSemanticLinks.title: Missing Semantic Navigation Links
missingSemanticLinks.whyItMatters: Your site relies on JavaScript (e.g., onClick or router.push) for navigation instead of proper 'a href' tags. Search engine crawlers do not click buttons or execute JavaScript routing. If you don't use proper links, Google cannot discover your internal pages.
missingSemanticLinks.expected: Use 'a href' or Next.js 'Link' components for all navigation

AuthModal.title: Unlock Advanced Features
AuthModal.subtitle: Sign in to your account to access professional SEO tools and save your progress.
AuthModal.benefit1Desc: Scan websites even if they block search engine crawlers.
AuthModal.benefit2Desc: Access all your previous SEO reports in one dashboard.
AuthModal.benefit3Desc: Coming soon: recursive page crawling and sitemap analysis.
